description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in a textured blue fabric. The sofa features three large, rectangular back cushions and three matching seat cushions, all of which appear to be firmly attached and uniformly sized. The chaise section extends out from one side, providing ample lounging space, and the armrests are straight, boxy, and padded, matching the overall geometric design. The sofa sits low to the ground, with its base and legs not visibly distinct, suggesting a block or hidden leg design. The upholstery is a solid blue with a subtle woven texture, giving it a contemporary and versatile appearance. This piece is suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments, such as patios, lobbies, or communal spaces.
description: A modern L-shaped blue sectional sofa with straight armrests, attached cushions, and a solid woven texture. The chaise extension and uniform design make it ideal for lounging in urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the sofa and the chaise extension projecting outward.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the sofa's overall width.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the armrest and the depth of the chaise section.
description_view_3: Front view revealing the three back cushions, three seat cushions, and the full L-shaped configuration.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, attached seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all uniform in size and arranged in a straight line with a chaise extension.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at both ends, padded and at seat height, with no decorative elements or material contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a block or hidden leg design integrated into the sofa base.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with three attached, rectangular cushions and no visible tufting or channeling.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue fabric with a subtle woven texture, no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
